The status hearing set for 9/5/18 and continued to 9/19/18, 10/3/18, and 10/17/18 was to track distribution of the $50,000 reserve withheld from final distribution. If receipts for the reserve, or any portion of the remaining reserve, are filed by 1/28/19, this "report" will be taken off calendar. If no receipts are filed by 1/28/19, an appearance will be required on 2/4/19.
